content.query:
CREATE VIEW         v_WaveReport
-- drop view v_WaveReport
as
SELECT      *
FROM
(
SELECT      PH.PLRI AS      [Wave]
--,           PH.WHLO AS      [Warehouse]
,           PH.DLIX AS      [Delivery Number]
--,           PH.PLSX AS      [Picking List Suffix]
--,           PH.PISS AS      [Picking Status]
--,           OC.CUNO AS      [Customer Number]
,           OC.CUNM AS      [Customer Name]
,           OC.CFC6 AS      [Document Format]
,           MI.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS AS      [Item Description]
,           MI.WHSL AS      [Location]
,           MI.RIDN AS      [Order Number]
--,           MI.RIDL AS      [Order Line]
,           MI.ALQT AS      [Picking Qty]
--,           MI.PAQT AS      [Packed Qty]
FROM        M3.MHPICH PH
JOIN        M3.MITALO MI on PH.DLIX = MI.RIDI
JOIN        M3.MHDISH MD ON PH.DLIX = MD.DLIX
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON MI.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON MD.CONA = OC.CUNO
WHERE       PH.PISS = '40'
) A

select distinct inou, count(*) from M3.MHDISH group by inou
